scriptTask.name: Log Task Retrieval
scriptTask.documentation: Log the retrieval of the investigation task for closure

scriptTask.name: Update Case to Pending Approval
Complete Investigation Task
scriptTask.documentation: Mark the investigation task as STATUS_30_COMPLETE

scriptTask.name: Create Approval Task
scriptTask.documentation: Create "Approve case closure" task with recommended outcome

userTask.name: Approve Case Closure
userTask.documentation: Supervisor reviews and approves or rejects the case closure

scriptTask.name: Notify Supervisor
scriptTask.documentation: Send notification to supervisor about new approval task

scriptTask.name: Log Approval Task Creation
scriptTask.documentation: Log the creation of the approval task

scriptTask.name: Log Task Assignment
scriptTask.documentation: Log the assignment of the approval task to Supervisors group

scriptTask.name: Approve and Close Case
scriptTask.documentation: Finalize case closure with supervisor approval

scriptTask.name: Reject Closure Request
scriptTask.documentation: Reject the case closure and return to investigator

scriptTask.name: Return for Additional Review
scriptTask.documentation: Return case to investigator for additional review
